namespace.patternError: namespace must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters or '-', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'my-name',  or '123-abc', regex used for validation is ^[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?$

viewSpec.layoutDescription: Domain name for OSMO services (service, web-ui, router).

bucketId.description: Select an existing S3 bucket or create a new one for OSMO workflow data.

inputProps.description: Use the YAML editor to set application parameters. Parameters set in compose mode are not automatically applied to the application settings tab.

data.defaultValue:
postgresql:
  global:
    security:
      allowInsecureImages: true
  image:
    registry: docker.io

  architecture: standalone
  auth:
    username: osmo
    database: osmo
    existingSecret: "db-secret"
    secretKeys:
      adminPasswordKey: db-password
      userPasswordKey: db-password
      replicationPasswordKey: db-password

osmo:
  mek: REPLACE WITH MEK
  dbPassword: REPLACE WITH DATABASE PASSWORD
  redisPassword: REPLACE WITH REDIS PASSWORD

workflowData:
  # Filled automatically by the marketplace bucket selector flow.
  bucket: AUTO_FILLED_BY_MARKETPLACE
  accessKeyId: AUTO_FILLED_BY_MARKETPLACE
  accessKey: AUTO_FILLED_BY_MARKETPLACE
  endpoint: AUTO_FILLED_BY_MARKETPLACE

service:
  global:
    osmoImageTag: latest

  services:
    configFile:
      enabled: true

    postgres:
      enabled: false
      db: osmo
      user: osmo
      serviceName: osmo-postgresql-hl

    redis:
      enabled: true
      port: 6379
      tlsEnabled: true
      storageClassName: compute-csi-default-sc

    service:
      scaling:
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 1

      hostname: osmo.example.com
      ingress:
        enabled: true
        ingressClass: nginx
        annotations:
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffer-size: "16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffers: "8 16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-busy-buffers-size: "32k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/large-client-header-buffers: "4 16k"

    agent:
      scaling:
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 1

    worker:
      scaling:
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 1

    logger:
      scaling:
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 1

  sidecars:
    envoy:
      enabled: false
    logAgent:
      enabled: false
      logrotate:
        enabled: false
    otel:
      enabled: false
    rateLimit:
      enabled: false

web-ui:
  global:
    osmoImageTag: latest

  services:
    ui:
      hostname: osmo.example.com
      apiHostname: osmo-service:80
      ingress:
        enabled: true
        ingressClass: nginx
        annotations:
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffer-size: "16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffers: "8 16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-busy-buffers-size: "32k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/large-client-header-buffers: "4 16k"

  sidecars:
    envoy:
      enabled: false

router:
  global:
    osmoImageTag: latest

  services:
    configFile:
      enabled: true

    postgres:
      db: osmo
      user: osmo
      serviceName: osmo-postgresql-hl
      passwordSecretName: osmo-postgresql

    service:
      scaling:
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 1
      hostname: osmo.example.com
      ingress:
        enabled: true
        ingressClass: nginx
        annotations:
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffer-size: "16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-buffers: "8 16k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-busy-buffers-size: "32k"
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/large-client-header-buffers: "4 16k"

  sidecars:
    envoy:
      enabled: false
    logAgent:
      enabled: false
    otel:
      enabled: false

backend-operator:
  global:
    osmoImageTag: latest
    serviceUrl: http://osmo-agent.default
    agentNamespace: osmo-operator
    backendNamespace: osmo-workflows
    backendName: default
    accountTokenSecret: osmo-operator-token
    loginMethod: token

  services:
    backendListener:
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "125m"
          memory: "128Mi"
        limits:
          cpu: "250m"
          memory: "256Mi"
    backendWorker:
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "125m"
          memory: "128Mi"
        limits:
          cpu: "250m"
          memory: "256Mi"

  sidecars:
    otel:
      enabled: false
